[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 11010000 3
4 00000000 a
5 00000010 1
6 11001001 4
7 01001000 2

01 10 01001000 2 match 7
12 21 01100000 2
23 32 01000001 2
34 43 01001000 2 match 7
45 54 01000000 1
56 65 10010000 2
67 76 00000010 1 match 5
70 07 00001010 2

02 20 01010011 4
13 31 01001000 2 match 7
24 42 01000010 2
35 53 11000000 2
46 64 00000010 1 match 5
57 75 00000000 a match 0 1 2 4
60 06 10010010 3
71 17 00001000 1

03 30 11001001 4 match 6
14 41 01001000 2 match 7
25 52 01110000 3
36 63 10000000 1
47 74 00001010 2
50 05 11010000 3 match 3
61 16 00000000 a match 0 1 2 4
72 27 00000010 1 match 5

04 40 01001010 3
15 51 01100000 2
26 62 00010010 2
37 73 00001000 1
[completion]
